channel.title: Production on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in Production on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: ai: Build 2026: From observability to ROI for AI agents on any framework
item.description:
Microsoft’s Build 2026 post frames AI agent production challenges around accuracy, safety, accountability, and silent drift after deployment. It points to end-to-end observability as the path to managing agents across frameworks and tying operations back to business ROI.

  • Source: Microsoft AI Foundry Blog

item.title: ai: Discovery to Execution: Scaling Agents with Toolboxes and Routines in Microsoft Foundry
item.description:
Microsoft Foundry is adding new Toolbox capabilities, including Skills, to help teams discover, manage, and secure tools for production agent workflows. The update is aimed at scaling agents from small-scale use to production execution.

  • Source: Microsoft AI Foundry Blog
